description: Decade profile: total, currently registered, survival rate, fuel mix, avg power/kerb/cc per decade. Use when user asks 100-year story, diesel arc, EV arrival, or long-term weight/power/cc trends.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1920 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1930, "1920s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1940, "1930s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1950, "1940s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1960, "1950s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s"), power_kw_clean = CLAMP(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, 1, 750), kerb_kg_clean = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum >= 300 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum <= 5000, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningKoereklarVaegtMinimum, null), displacement_cc_clean = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorSlagVolumen > 50 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorSlagVolumen <= 9000, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorSlagVolumen, null) | STATS total = COUNT(*), currently_registered = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret", petrol = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Benzin", diesel = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "Diesel", electric = COUNT(*) WHERE _drivkraft_primaer == "El", avg_power_kw = AVG(power_kw_clean), avg_kerb_kg = AVG(kerb_kg_clean), avg_cc = AVG(displacement_cc_clean) BY decade | EVAL petrol_pct = ROUND(petrol * 100.0 / total, 1), diesel_pct = ROUND(diesel * 100.0 / total, 1), electric_pct = ROUND(electric * 100.0 / total, 1), survival_pct = ROUND(currently_registered * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT decade ASC | LIMIT 15
